author: claude
content:
## Revised fix approach (depends on #13 / GH #1159)

Instead of removing live sites or marking xfail, restructure the test to leverage DNS instrumentation:

For each site in TEST_SITES:
1. Assert a dns_responses row exists (proves browser attempted resolution — works whether site is up or not)
2. If addresses IS NOT NULL (DNS succeeded):
   - Assert http_requests row exists for that domain
   - Assert places.sqlite contains the domain
3. If addresses IS NULL / error column set (DNS failed):
   - Skip HTTP/places assertions — site was unreachable, not a test failure

This makes the test deterministic regardless of network conditions. baidu.com timing out becomes a valid test path rather than a failure. The test still exercises live DNS (proving instrumentation works on real domains) without being flaky on live HTTP.

Blocked on: issue #13 (onErrorOccurred) for the DNS failure capture path.
